# Gene-gene LRI heatmap and UMAP

```{r gene-gene-lri}
lri_results <- plot_gene_gene_lri_heatmap_umap(
  malignant_list = TARGET.malignant,
  dataset_label  = TARGET_DATASET,
  output_dir     = WITHIN_COHORT_OUTPUT_DIR,
  min_genes      = MIN_GENES_PER_LRI,
  k_clusters     = K_CLUSTERS,
  umap_seed      = UMAP_SEED
)
```
